name: Add a page + nav link, preserve the existing page and nav
prompt: Add a new 'Pricing' page that says 'Simple, transparent pricing for every team.', and add a 'Pricing' link to the top navigation menu. Don't change any of the existing pages or menu items.

setup.content:
site:
  name: "My Business"
  tagline: "The best in the business"
  primaryColor: "#4f46e5"
  bgEffect: ["grid", "aura", "hover"]
  logo: ""

contact:
  email: "hello@example.com"
  phone: ""

social:
  twitter: ""
  linkedin: ""
  instagram: ""

navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"
  - label: "About"
    url: "/about"
  - label: "Services"
    url: "/services"
  - label: "Contact"
    url: "/contact"

analytics:
  enabled: true
  website_id: "da39a3ee-5e6b-4b0d-9c8a-c47c5d6e2e3a"

---
title: "About"
description: "Learn about our company"
pageLayout: "full"
---

## Our Story

Founded in 2010, Acme has shipped over nine thousand widgets to delighted customers.

content/pages/pricing.mdx: Simple, transparent pricing for every team.
content/pages/about.mdx: Founded in 2010, Acme has shipped over nine thousand widgets to delighted customers.

dom.contains: Simple, transparent pricing for every team.

checks.judge: A new Pricing page was created containing 'Simple, transparent pricing for every team.', and a 'Pricing' link was added to the navigation. All four pre-existing navigation entries (Home, About, Services, Contact) are still present, and the existing About page — including its 'Our Story' content about widgets shipped since 2010 — is completely unchanged.

dry_run.text: Created content/pages/pricing.mdx with the pricing line and added a 'Pricing' entry to the navigation in content/settings.yaml; left the existing About page and all other menu items unchanged.

edits.content/pages/pricing.mdx:

title: "Pricing"
description: "Our pricing plans"
pageLayout: "full"
---
